list.name: asset
list.label: Asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT asset FROM pca_signals ORDER BY asset

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Trades" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps), 0)::numeric, 1) as "Avg PnL" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps), 0)::numeric, 1) as "Total PnL" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(shadow_hold_time_ms) / 60000.0, 1) as "Hold Time" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_hold_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')

panels.title: Cumulative Shadow PnL (bps)
panels.description: Running sum of shadow_pnl_bps over time. This is the key equity curve.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(shadow_exit_timestamp / 1000) as time, SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp) as "Cumulative Shadow PnL (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp

panels.title: Daily Shadow PnL (bps)
panels.description: Shadow PnL summed by day as bars

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', to_timestamp(shadow_exit_timestamp / 1000)) as time, SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) as "Daily PnL (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY time

panels.title: Per-Asset Performance
panels.description: Shadow trade performance by asset, sorted by total bps descending

targets.rawSql: SELECT asset as "Asset", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Avg (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Total (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') GROUP BY asset ORDER BY SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Regime Breakdown
panels.description: Shadow trade performance by market regime

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(regime_state, 'unknown') as "Regime", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Avg (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Total (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') GROUP BY regime_state ORDER BY SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Direction Breakdown
panels.description: Shadow trade performance by long vs short

targets.rawSql: SELECT direction as "Direction", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Avg (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Total (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') GROUP BY direction ORDER BY SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) DESC

panels.title: Shadow vs Live PnL Comparison
panels.description: Overlay of cumulative shadow PnL (bps from pca_signals) and cumulative live/paper PnL (USD from perps_executions). Note: different units -- shadow is bps, live is USD.

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_timestamp(shadow_exit_timestamp / 1000) as time, SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) OVER (ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp) as "Shadow PnL (bps)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp

SELECT created_at as time, SUM(realized_pnl) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) as "Live PnL (USD)" FROM perps_executions WHERE status = 'closed' AND created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY created_at

panels.title: Rolling 50-Trade Win Rate
panels.description: 50-trade rolling window win rate over time

targets.rawSql: WITH numbered AS (SELECT to_timestamp(shadow_exit_timestamp / 1000) as time, shadow_pnl_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp) as rn FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}')) SELECT time, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN shadow_pnl_bps > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY rn ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / LEAST(rn, 50), 1) as "Rolling Win Rate %" FROM numbered ORDER BY time

panels.title: Performance by Shadow Exit Reason
panels.description: Shadow trade performance grouped by exit reason

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(shadow_exit_reason, 'unknown') as "Exit Reason", COUNT(*) as "Trades", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE shadow_pnl_bps > 0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as "Win Rate %", ROUND(AVG(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Avg (bps)", ROUND(SUM(shadow_pnl_bps)::numeric, 1) as "Total (bps)", ROUND(AVG(shadow_hold_time_ms) / 60000.0, 1) as "Avg Hold (min)" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') GROUP BY shadow_exit_reason ORDER BY SUM(shadow_pnl_bps) DESC

SELECT to_timestamp(shadow_exit_timestamp / 1000) as "Resolved", asset as "Asset", direction as "Dir", ROUND(z_score::numeric, 2) as "Entry Z", ROUND(shadow_pnl_bps::numeric, 1) as "PnL (bps)", ROUND(shadow_peak_pnl_bps::numeric, 1) as "Peak (bps)", ROUND(shadow_trough_pnl_bps::numeric, 1) as "Trough (bps)", shadow_exit_reason as "Exit Reason", ROUND(shadow_hold_time_ms / 60000.0, 1) as "Hold (min)", COALESCE(regime_state, '') as "Regime" FROM pca_signals WHERE shadow_pnl_bps IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND shadow_exit_timestamp BETWEEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM $__timeTo()::timestamptz) * 1000 AND ('${asset}' = 'all' OR asset = ANY(string_to_array('${asset}', ','))) AND ('${direction}' = 'all' OR direction = '${direction}') AND ('${regime}' = 'all' OR regime_state = '${regime}') ORDER BY shadow_exit_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
